_comment: This file is read by BOTH check-doc-cites.mjs (the citation lint) and doc-drift-status.mjs (the drift-detection tool) as their shared per-repo config. scopedDocDirs/extraDeclarationPatterns ship EMPTY here (this is the raw template) — docs-init-or-improve/docs-migrate fill them in at install time from the target repo's own docs/STRUCTURE.md 'substantive areas' table. l2MinorPct/l2MajorPct/minAbsoluteLinesChanged (drift-tool thresholds) are optional; omit to use the tool's built-in defaults (15/40/5).
